item.title: Alto Neuroscience ALTO-300
item.description:
• Summary: Alto Neuroscience has discontinued the development of ALTO-300, its investigational drug for cognitive impairment in schizophrenia, following a failed Phase 2 clinical trial. The program aimed to address a key unmet need in schizophrenia treatment but did not meet primary endpoints, leading to its shelving.
  • MoAs: ALTO-300 is a novel therapeutic targeting cognitive deficits in schizophrenia; specific MoA involves modulation of neurotransmitter systems such as glutamatergic or dopaminergic pathways, but exact mechanism not disclosed in provided context.
  • Sources: Endpoints News
